title: (SACRAMENTO, CA) –
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem
raw_preview:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The number of homes and businesses with rooftop solar has grown at an unprecedented rate in California.",
    "Many photovoltaic (PV) panels first installed are approaching the end of their life cycle of 25 years.",
    "California has more than one million solar roofs."
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The number of homes and businesses with rooftop solar has grown at an unprecedented rate in California.",
    "Many photovoltaic (PV) panels first installed are approaching the end of their life cycle of 25 years.",
    "California has more than one million solar roofs.",
    "Growth in solar installations is expected to increase exponentially in the next five years.",
    "The United States is expected to accumulate as much as one million tons of solar power waste by 2030.",
    "By 2050, the United States will have the second highest number of end-of-life panels in the world, with as many as 10 million total tons of solar power waste.",
    "Establishing an end-of-life program for solar panels will reduce the environmental impact of solar power waste.",
    "An end-of-life program will allow raw materials and other valuable components to be recycled into new solar panels."
  ]
}
```
